data.title: Dreame Personal Care Revenue Surges 1,230% in North America as Company Unveils Full Product Lineup at DREAME NEXT with Luxury Runway-Style Launch
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a renowned global technology company, launched its complete range of personal care products at the Self Next segment of DREAME NEXT. The event, resembling a luxury runway show, included live styling demonstrations.

data.title: Steve Wozniak Surprisingly Appears at DREAME NEXT: Dreame Unveils Two Smartphones with 10+ Industry Breakthroughs
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology unveiled the AURORA NEX flagship smartphone and the AURORA LUX luxury smartphone at the Connect Next event of DREAME NEXT. These two phones collectively offer over 10 innovative features to users.

data.title: Buenaventura Announces First Quarter Results
data.description: LIMA, Peru—Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (“Buenaventura” or “the Company”) disclosed its first-quarter (1Q26) results ending on March 31, 2026. As Peru's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining firm, Buenaventura trades on the NYSE under BVN and the Lima Stock Exchange as BUE.LM. The financial data presented adheres to IFRS and is denominated in U.S. dollars (US$). Key points for the first quarter of 2026 include a rise in gold production.

data.title: CBS ArcSafe® RSK-CSH-W Chicken Switch Hitter Remote Switching Kit Wins Specialty Products Category in EC&M's Product of the Year Awards
data.description: In Denton, Texas, on April 29, 2026, CBS ArcSafe, a prominent producer of remote racking and switching solutions for low- and medium-voltage switchgear, revealed that their RSK-CSH-W Chicken Switch Hitter wireless remote switching kit has been recognized as a category champion. This kit showcases advanced technology and has received positive acclaim within the industry.

data.title: ASTON MARTIN NEWPORT BEACH NAMED THE 2025 DEALER OF THE YEAR IN THE AMERICAS FOR THE SECOND CONSECUTIVE YEAR
data.description: A prestigious award has been presented to Aston Martin Newport Beach in California. The dealership has been named the 2025 Dealer of the Year in the Americas during Aston Martin's annual Wings Awards ceremony. This achievement marks the second consecutive year that Aston Martin Newport Beach has received this honor. The award recognizes the dealership's exceptional performance and dedication to customer service.

data.title: Houston Boston Partnership and Adams Automotive Appoints Mike Quinn as Houston Market Leader
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Houston Boston Partnership and Adams Automotive named Mike Quinn as the Houston Market Leader. In this significant role, he will supervise operations at various locations throughout the Houston market. This move highlights a strategic decision by the companies to entrust Quinn with managing key aspects of their business in Houston.

data.title: "The Flash" Dwyane Wade Joins Dreame Next in Silicon Valley as Dreame Wet Dry Vacuum Showcases New Products and Latest Technologies
data.description: In San Francisco on April 28, 2026, Dreame Wet Dry Vacuum unveiled its newest products during the "Dreame Next" global launch event at the Palace of Fine Arts. The event showcased the latest technology and live product demonstrations, marking the introduction of their North America offerings.

data.title: Current 1031 Introduces 3% Interest on All Exchange Funds
data.description: A California-based company, Current 1031 LLC, has announced a competitive interest rate of 3% for all 1031 exchanges.

data.title: Ascletis to Present Data on Multiple Programs at the American Diabetes Association's 2026 Scientific Sessions
data.description: Ascletis Pharma Inc. (HKEX: 1672, "Ascletis") has revealed their plans to showcase various programs at the American Diabetes Association's 2026 Scientific Sessions in New Orleans, Louisiana from June 5 to 8, 2026. The poster presentations will feature a range of initiatives from the company.
